agents.name: Principal Agent
agents.purpose: Coordinate the summer learning program, assign teacher agents, monitor motivation, and route parent approvals.

agents.name: Curriculum Architect Agent
agents.purpose: Create grade-tuned weekly plans, optional enrichment tracks, and curriculum coherence.

agents.name: Diagnostic Analyst Agent
agents.purpose: Run a low-pressure readiness check and summarize strengths, support needs, and adaptive tuning.

agents.name: Teacher Agent
agents.purpose: Teach Math, ELA, Coding/AI, Science, History/Civics, and World Affairs with support/standard/stretch guidance.

agents.name: Activity Coach Agent
agents.purpose: Encourage daily movement, outdoor play with parent supervision, hydration, sleep, and healthy habits.

agents.name: Rewards Agent
agents.purpose: Convert completed missions into XP, mastery stars, camp coins, and parent-approved rewards.

agents.name: Social Coordinator Agent
agents.purpose: Manage parent-approved friend invites, safe squad visibility, and shared project roles.

agents.name: Teacher Liaison Agent
agents.purpose: Create parent-approved reports, progress summaries, and school-share packages.

agents.name: Safety Moderator Agent
agents.purpose: Block unsafe personal information sharing, private child messaging, bullying, and unsafe links.
